/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVK/X SENTENCE NUNC PRO TUNC FROM 12-31-08/AJW/CH1 SP 16M L/X DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 400 DAYSCOUNTY JAIL,     400 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 800 DAYS,/DNA/VF5 200/PROBFINE1/PAR/CC/X RESTITUTION SET TO CLOVE MILK IN THE AMOUNT OF $93,92/CTORD SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UIT2/PARDATE DEFT NOT PRESENT IN COURT, DEFT IS SERVING TIME IN PELICAN BASTATE PRISON/PAR70/
